title: Possible US-Iran meeting Monday if Araghchi stays — Iranian diplomatic source
snippet: Middle East Eye reports that a possible US-Iran meeting could occur on Monday if Araghchi remains in the region. Iranian diplomatic source says conditions include 'respect for sovereignty' and 'no preconditions from Washington.' Araghchi's multi-stop itinerary (Islamabad-Muscat-Moscow) could be adjusted. Witkoff team expected in Islamabad by Sunday.
tag_reason: New detail about possible Monday US-Iran meeting — concrete timeline and conditions not previously reported. Key forward-looking diplomatic signal.
